The '''dragon dagger''' is the second-strongest [[dagger]] available in ''[[Old School RuneScape]]'', behind the [[abyssal dagger]]. It can be wielded by players with at least 60 [[Attack]] after completion of the [[Lost City]] quest. As with most daggers, it can be [[Poison#Weapon poisoning|poisoned]].

If casting either of the [[alchemy spells]] on a dragon dagger, use a [[cleaning cloth]] on [[poison|poisoned]] versions to make more profit, as the [[value]] of the unpoisoned dagger is higher than any of the poisoned versions: {{NoCoins|18,000|c}} compared to {{NoCoins|14,400|c}}.

As with most [[dragon equipment]], the dragon dagger '''cannot''' be made from raw materials using the [[Smithing]] skill.

==Special attack==
[[File:Puncture.gif|frame|A player performing the dragon dagger's special attack, ''Puncture''.]]
The dragon dagger's [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Puncture'', deals two hits at once with an extra 15% accuracy and 15% damage for each of the two hits, consuming 25% of the wielder's special attack energy. ''Puncture'' rolls against opponent's slash defence roll.

When used against other players, both hits are applied simultaneously. There is a slight delay between the two hits when the special is used on NPCs.

The special attack's highest possible hit under normal combat conditions is 50 damage for each of the two hits, or a total of '''100''' damage. Although rare, the poisoned dagger's special attack can occasionally stack with the [[Weapon poison(++)|poison]] damage, resulting in a theoretical damage stack of 106. Against a Slayer target with a [[black mask]] or [[Slayer helmet]] equipped, the maximum becomes 54 per hit, dealing a maximum of '''108''' damage.

For these reasons, the dragon dagger is a staple 'knock-out' weapon in [[Player killing|PvP]] combat and a cheap option for a high-damage spec weapon in [[Monster killing|PvM]]. [[Dragon claws]] are often superior but carry a much higher price.

==Trivia==
[[File:Stranger.gif|220px|thumb|The [[stranger]] uses the dragon dagger's special attack, ''Puncture''.]]
* The [[stranger]] that may be encountered during [[Desert Treasure I]] uses a poisoned dragon dagger and is capable of using the special attack in rapid succession. [[Saradomin wizard]]s and melee-using [[Ancient Wizard|ancient wizards]] also use a poisoned dragon dagger.
* If the dragon dagger's special attack deals more damage than required to kill the opponent, it will provide experience for the surplus damage, like other weapons with a multi-hit special attack, such as [[dragon claws]].
* The dragon dagger is one of five daggers with its blade pointing down; the other four are the [[keris]], [[abyssal dagger]], [[killer's knife]], and [[hunting knife]].
* Prior to [[22 August]] [[2006]], the [[weapon poison(+)]] and [[weapon poison(++)]] variants of the dragon dagger were named dragon dagger(+), which was for extra strong weapon poison, and dragon dagger(s), which was for super weapon poison—hence the nickname, "DDS". This was later changed to the current (p+) and (p++) naming convention to avoid confusion with Saradomin items, which also use (s).{{CiteNews |url=https://secure.runescape.com/m=news/naming-conventions |title=Naming conventions |newsdate=22 August 2006}}
